instruction: Build a todo list component with add, toggle, and delete
relevant_when: Agent builds React components with lists and user interactions
context: Proactively check that agents apply React best practices when building interactive list components.

checklist.name: stable-keys-not-index
checklist.rule: Todo list items use a stable unique identifier (e.g. todo.id, generated UUID, or incrementing counter) as the key prop, NOT the array index. Using key={index} or key={i} on items that can be reordered, inserted, or deleted is a failure.
checklist.relevant_when: Agent renders a list of todo items with .map()

checklist.name: controlled-input
checklist.rule: The text input for adding todos is a controlled component with value bound to state and onChange updating state
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds a form input for adding todo items

checklist.name: form-prevents-default
checklist.rule: The form submit handler calls e.preventDefault() to prevent page reload
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds a form for adding todo items

checklist.name: input-validation
checklist.rule: Agent validates the input before adding a todo (e.g. prevents adding empty/whitespace-only items) and shows feedback
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds a form for adding todo items

checklist.name: accessible-button-labels
checklist.rule: Interactive elements (delete buttons, toggle buttons) have accessible text content or aria-label so screen readers can identify their purpose
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds interactive list items with action buttons

checklist.name: role-alert-on-errors
checklist.rule: Any validation error message uses role="alert" so screen readers announce it

checklist.name: aria-required-on-input
checklist.rule: The required todo input has aria-required="true"
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds a required form input

checklist.name: typescript-props-typed
checklist.rule: Component props are typed with TypeScript interfaces, not using 'any'
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes React components with TypeScript
